turns.query: Analyze emission variability and stability between Hebei Taihang Steel Group and Hegang Leting Steel on 2025-06-10.
turns.actual_response: 2025年6月10日，河北太行钢铁集团有限公司（ID: 2447）的废气排放变异系数（CV）为0.0317，河钢乐亭钢铁有限公司（ID: 2412）的变异系数为0.0908。变异系数越低表示排放波动越小、运行越稳定。因此，河北太行钢铁集团有限公司的排放更为稳定，其公司ID为2447。
code_snippets:
from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd

# 第一步：解析两家公司的名称，获取company_id
query_taihang = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name = '河北太行钢铁集团有限公司' OR name LIKE '%太行%' AND industry_type = 'STEEL'
LIMIT 5
""")
df_taihang = pd.read_sql(query_taihang, engine)
print("太行钢铁查询结果:")
print(df_taihang)

query_leting = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name = '鹤岗市乐亭钢铁有限公司' OR name LIKE '%乐亭%' AND industry_type = 'STEEL'
LIMIT 5
""")
df_leting = pd.read_sql(query_leting, engine)
print("\n乐亭钢铁查询结果:")
print(df_leting)

from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd

# 搜索"鹤岗乐亭钢铁"相关公司
query_leting_check = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id 
FROM polluting_company 
WHERE name LIKE '%鹤岗%' OR name LIKE '%乐亭%'
LIMIT 10
""")
df_leting_check = pd.read_sql(query_leting_check, engine)
print("乐亭钢铁相关公司:")
print(df_leting_check)

# 确认太行钢铁的company_id
company_id_taihang = 2447
company_id_leting = 2412  # 河钢乐亭钢铁有限公司

print(f"\n太行钢铁 company_id: {company_id_taihang}")
print(f"乐亭钢铁 company_id: {company_id_leting}")

from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd

# 获取太行钢铁在2025-06-10的小时排放数据
query_taihang = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, hc, nmhc, co, hcl
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2447 
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00' 
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
df_taihang_emission = pd.read_sql(query_taihang, engine)
print(f"太行钢铁排放数据行数: {len(df_taihang_emission)}")
print(df_taihang_emission.head())

# 获取乐亭钢铁在2025-06-10的小时排放数据
query_leting = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas, nox, so2, pm, hc, nmhc, co, hcl
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2412 
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00' 
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")
df_leting_emission = pd.read_sql(query_leting, engine)
print(f"\n乐亭钢铁排放数据行数: {len(df_leting_emission)}")
print(df_leting_emission.head())

import numpy as np

# 计算太行钢铁的exhaust_gas变异系数
mean_taihang = df_taihang_emission['exhaust_gas'].mean()
std_taihang = df_taihang_emission['exhaust_gas'].std(ddof=0)  # 总体标准差
cv_taihang = std_taihang / mean_taihang

# 计算乐亭钢铁的exhaust_gas变异系数
mean_leting = df_leting_emission['exhaust_gas'].mean()
std_leting = df_leting_emission['exhaust_gas'].std(ddof=0)  # 总体标准差
cv_leting = std_leting / mean_leting

# 确定更稳定的公司（CV更低）
if cv_taihang < cv_leting:
    more_stable_company_id = 2447
else:
    more_stable_company_id = 2412

print(f"太行钢铁 exhaust_gas 均值: {mean_taihang:.2f}")
print(f"太行钢铁 exhaust_gas 标准差: {std_taihang:.2f}")
print(f"太行钢铁 CV: {cv_taihang:.6f}")
print(f"\n乐亭钢铁 exhaust_gas 均值: {mean_leting:.2f}")
print(f"乐亭钢铁 exhaust_gas 标准差: {std_leting:.2f}")
print(f"乐亭钢铁 CV: {cv_leting:.6f}")
print(f"\n更稳定的公司ID: {more_stable_company_id}")

# 赋值给任务要求的变量
cv_taihang = cv_taihang
cv_leting = cv_leting
more_stable_company_id = more_stable_company_id

# 确认变量已正确赋值
print(f"cv_taihang = {cv_taihang}")
print(f"cv_leting = {cv_leting}")
print(f"more_stable_company_id = {more_stable_company_id}")

import pandas as pd
from sqlalchemy import text

# 查看已有的数据
print("=== 太行钢铁数据 ===")
print(f"公司ID: {company_id_taihang}")
print(f"数据行数: {len(df_taihang)}")
print(f"均值: {mean_taihang}")
print(f"标准差: {std_taihang}")
print(f"前5行数据:")
print(df_taihang.head())

print("\n=== 乐亭钢铁数据 ===")
print(f"公司ID: {company_id_leting}")
print(f"数据行数: {len(df_leting)}")
print(f"均值: {mean_leting}")
print(f"标准差: {std_leting}")
print(f"前5行数据:")
print(df_leting.head())

# 查看排放数据
print("=== 太行钢铁排放数据 ===")
print(f"数据行数: {len(df_taihang_emission)}")
print(f"列名: {df_taihang_emission.columns.tolist()}")
print(f"前5行:")
print(df_taihang_emission.head())

print("\n=== 乐亭钢铁排放数据 ===")
print(f"数据行数: {len(df_leting_emission)}")
print(f"列名: {df_leting_emission.columns.tolist()}")
print(f"前5行:")
print(df_leting_emission.head())

import numpy as np

# 计算太行钢铁exhaust_gas的均值和标准差
exhaust_taihang = df_taihang_emission['exhaust_gas'].values
mean_taihang_calc = np.mean(exhaust_taihang)
std_taihang_calc = np.std(exhaust_taihang, ddof=0)  # 总体标准差
cv_taihang_calc = std_taihang_calc / mean_taihang_calc

# 计算乐亭钢铁exhaust_gas的均值和标准差
exhaust_leting = df_leting_emission['exhaust_gas'].values
mean_leting_calc = np.mean(exhaust_leting)
std_leting_calc = np.std(exhaust_leting, ddof=0)  # 总体标准差
cv_leting_calc = std_leting_calc / mean_leting_calc

# 比较CV，找出更稳定的公司
if cv_taihang_calc < cv_leting_calc:
    more_stable_company_id_calc = company_id_taihang
else:
    more_stable_company_id_calc = company_id_leting

print(f"=== 太行钢铁 ===")
print(f"exhaust_gas 均值: {mean_taihang_calc}")
print(f"exhaust_gas 标准差: {std_taihang_calc}")
print(f"CV: {cv_taihang_calc}")

print(f"\n=== 乐亭钢铁 ===")
print(f"exhaust_gas 均值: {mean_leting_calc}")
print(f"exhaust_gas 标准差: {std_leting_calc}")
print(f"CV: {cv_leting_calc}")

print(f"\n=== 比较结果 ===")
print(f"太行钢铁 CV: {cv_taihang_calc}")
print(f"乐亭钢铁 CV: {cv_leting_calc}")
print(f"更稳定的公司ID: {more_stable_company_id_calc}")
print(f"更稳定的公司名称: {'河北太行钢铁集团有限公司' if more_stable_company_id_calc == company_id_taihang else '河钢乐亭钢铁有限公司'}")

cv_taihang = cv_taihang_calc
cv_leting = cv_leting_calc
more_stable_company_id = more_stable_company_id_calc

print(f"cv_taihang: {cv_taihang}")
print(f"cv_leting: {cv_leting}")
print(f"more_stable_company_id: {more_stable_company_id}")

from sqlalchemy import text
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# 第一步：查找两家公司的company_id
query_company = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id, industry_type
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name LIKE '%太行%' OR name LIKE '%Leting%' OR name LIKE '%莱亭%'
LIMIT 20
""")
companies = pd.read_sql(query_company, engine)
print("相关公司列表：")
print(companies[['id', 'name', 'city_id', 'district_id', 'industry_type']])

# 第二步：查找Hegang Leting Steel的公司信息
query_leting = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id, industry_type
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name LIKE '%Leting%' OR name LIKE '%莱特%' OR name LIKE '%鹤岗%'
LIMIT 20
""")
leting_companies = pd.read_sql(query_leting, engine)
print("莱特钢铁相关公司：")
print(leting_companies[['id', 'name', 'city_id', 'district_id', 'industry_type']])

# 第三步：更广泛地搜索"莱特"或"Leting"相关的钢铁公司
query_leting2 = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id, industry_type
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name LIKE '%莱特%' OR name LIKE '%Leting%' OR name LIKE '%莱亭%' OR name LIKE '%鹤岗%'
LIMIT 30
""")
leting_companies2 = pd.read_sql(query_leting2, engine)
print("更广泛的莱特/鹤岗公司列表：")
print(leting_companies2[['id', 'name', 'city_id', 'district_id', 'industry_type']])

# 同时搜索所有STEEL类型的公司，看看是否有匹配
query_steel = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id, industry_type
FROM polluting_company
WHERE industry_type = 'STEEL'
LIMIT 50
""")
steel_companies = pd.read_sql(query_steel, engine)
print("\n所有钢铁公司（前50条）：")
print(steel_companies[['id', 'name', 'city_id', 'district_id', 'industry_type']])

# 第四步：更广泛地搜索可能的公司名称变体
query_search = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id, industry_type
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name LIKE '%莱特%' OR name LIKE '%Leting%' OR name LIKE '%莱亭%' OR name LIKE '%鹤岗%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Hegang%' OR name LIKE '%Hegang%'
LIMIT 50
""")
search_results = pd.read_sql(query_search, engine)
print("所有可能的莱特/鹤岗相关公司：")
print(search_results[['id', 'name', 'city_id', 'district_id', 'industry_type']])

# 同时搜索所有包含"钢"的公司，看看是否有遗漏
query_all_steel = text("""
SELECT id, name, city_id, district_id, industry_type
FROM polluting_company
WHERE name LIKE '%钢%' AND industry_type = 'STEEL'
LIMIT 100
""")
all_steel = pd.read_sql(query_all_steel, engine)
print("\n所有钢铁公司（前100条）：")
print(all_steel[['id', 'name', 'city_id', 'district_id', 'industry_type']])

# 第五步：确认两家公司信息并查询2025-06-10的每小时排放数据
# 河北太行钢铁集团有限公司 id: 2447
# 河钢乐亭钢铁有限公司 id: 2412

# 查询两家公司在2025-06-10的每小时exhaust_gas数据
query_taihang = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2447 
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00' 
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")

query_leting = text("""
SELECT timestamp, exhaust_gas
FROM hourly_polluting_company_emission
WHERE company_id = 2412 
  AND timestamp >= '2025-06-10 00:00:00' 
  AND timestamp < '2025-06-11 00:00:00'
ORDER BY timestamp
""")

df_taihang = pd.read_sql(query_taihang, engine)
df_leting = pd.read_sql(query_leting, engine)

print("河北太行钢铁集团有限公司 (2447) 2025-06-10 每小时排放数据：")
print(f"记录数：{len(df_taihang)}")
print(df_taihang.head(10))
print(f"\n河钢乐亭钢铁有限公司 (2412) 2025-06-10 每小时排放数据：")
print(f"记录数：{len(df_leting)}")
print(df_leting.head(10))

import numpy as np

# 计算河北太行钢铁集团有限公司 (2447) 的CV
exhaust_taihang = df_taihang['exhaust_gas'].values
mean_taihang = np.mean(exhaust_taihang)
std_taihang = np.std(exhaust_taihang, ddof=0)  # population std
cv_taihang = std_taihang / mean_taihang

# 计算河钢乐亭钢铁有限公司 (2412) 的CV
exhaust_leting = df_leting['exhaust_gas'].values
mean_leting = np.mean(exhaust_leting)
std_leting = np.std(exhaust_leting, ddof=0)  # population std
cv_leting = std_leting / mean_leting

print(f"河北太行钢铁集团有限公司 (2447):")
print(f"  均值: {mean_taihang:.2f}")
print(f"  标准差: {std_taihang:.2f}")
print(f"  CV: {cv_taihang:.6f}")

print(f"\n河钢乐亭钢铁有限公司 (2412):")
print(f"  均值: {mean_leting:.2f}")
print(f"  标准差: {std_leting:.2f}")
print(f"  CV: {cv_leting:.6f}")

# 确定更稳定的公司
if cv_taihang < cv_leting:
    more_stable_company_id = 2447
    print(f"\n更稳定的公司: 河北太行钢铁集团有限公司 (ID: {more_stable_company_id})")
else:
    more_stable_company_id = 2412
    print(f"\n更稳定的公司: 河钢乐亭钢铁有限公司 (ID: {more_stable_company_id})")

# 存储结果
cv_taihang = float(cv_taihang)
cv_leting = float(cv_leting)
more_stable_company_id = int(more_stable_company_id)

print(f"\n最终结果:")
print(f"cv_taihang: {cv_taihang}")
print(f"cv_leting: {cv_leting}")
print(f"more_stable_company_id: {more_stable_company_id}")
